hooks.command:
cd /Users/bawhun/ClaudeProjects/1v1-games && STATUS=$(git status --short 2>/dev/null); UNPUSHED=$(git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null); MSG=$(printf '## Session Git State

**Uncommitted/untracked:** %s

**Unpushed commits:** %s' "${STATUS:-none}" "${UNPUSHED:-none}"); printf '%s' "$MSG" | jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": .}}'

DATA=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$DATA" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q "/client/" && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.css$|/(next|tailwind|postcss)\.config\.|/app/layout\.tsx$'; then lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 0.5; cd /Users/bawhun/ClaudeProjects/1v1-games/client && nohup npm run dev >> /tmp/nextjs-dev.log 2>&1 & echo '{"systemMessage": "Client dev server restarting — CSS/config change detected"}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if dev server restart needed...
